## 📝 Pull Request Summary

### Description
Provide a concise summary of the changes made, the rationale behind them, and what problem they solve.

### Type of Change
- [ ] 🚀 New Feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance Optimization
- [ ] ♻️ Code Refactoring / Cleaning
- [ ] 📝 Documentation Update
- [ ] 🔧 Chore (dependencies, workflow, tooling)

---

## 🛠️ Verification & Testing

### Automated Tests
Describe the automated tests run to verify the changes. Include instructions on how to reproduce them.
- [ ] Backend tests run locally via `pytest` (Attach output or status)
- [ ] Frontend builds cleanly via `npm run build`

### Manual Verification
Describe manual verification steps performed (UI check, endpoint responses, etc.). Include screenshots if applicable.
1. 
2.

## 🛡️ Pre-Merge Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please check that you have completed the following:
- [ ] **No Secrets:** I have verified that no API keys, credentials, or environment-specific configs are committed.
- [ ] **Line Endings:** All files utilize Unix-style (`LF`) line endings.
- [ ] **Documentation:** Public APIs are fully documented with type annotations.
- [ ] **Clean Code:** Code is formatted cleanly and matches project style rules.
- [ ] **Surgical Edits:** Only files relevant to the task were modified (no formatting changes outside scope).
- [ ] **Self-Review:** I have audited my own code line-by-line.
